ModMetaData.name: Matter Anywhere
ModMetaData.author: TheFarawayDev
ModMetaData.description:
Matter Anywhere is a cross-map network bridge addon for Matter Network. By building a Quantum Network Relay, you can sync your local digital storage reserves to a planetary ledger, making your digitized items accessible across different map instances.
Dev Note: This mod is an addon and a tribute to SK's original fantastic work on Matter Network. All credit for the base digitization concept, textures, and mechanics goes to SK.
